title: John Swinney accused of putting UK's 'special relationship' with US in peril over use of Scottish airport for Iran war

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: John Swinney has been accused of putting the relationship with the US under threat after he suggested he would "consider" banning US military planes from a key Scottish airport

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: John Swinney has been accused of putting the relationship with the US under threat after he suggested he would "consider" banning US military planes from a key Scottish airport.The First Minister said US military aircraft could be banned from using Glasgow Prestwick Airport by if it was confirmed th... The SNP Leader is under pressure from the Scottish Greens to disclose the details around the use of Glasgow Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: Mojtaba Khamenei escaped death by just seconds after taking stroll in garden John Swinney accused of putting UK's 'special relationship' with US in peril over use of Scottish airport for Iran war
